#Kontakt
---
title: "Kontakt"
---

```{=html}
<style>
.profile-picture {
  display: inline-block;
  border-radius: 50%;
  object-fit: cover;
  width: 200px;
  height: 200px;
}

figcaption {
  text-align: center;
}
</style>
```

# Kontaktpersoner

Projektkoordinator og kontaktperson\
Kirsten Christensen\
Mail: kichis\@rm.dk\
tlf. 



![Annelli Sandbæk](/images/Annelli.jpg){.profile-picture}

Ansvarlig for projektet\
Annelli Sandbæk\
mail: anesnd\@rm.dk\
tlf. 2128 2073

:::
